---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- One paragraph. What's the user-facing pain point? Concrete
     scenarios beat abstract wishlists ("I plug in my hub and can't
     tell which port is overcommitted" beats "more diagnostics
     please"). -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like Manifold to do. UI sketch / wording / behavior
     description — whatever fits the request. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything else you thought about + why it didn't fit. Optional
     but helps the maintainers understand the design space. -->

## Out of scope

Manifold deliberately does NOT cover:

- Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, AirPlay, Continuity (the "physical only" scope
  per BRIEF.md).
- VPN, SMB, NFS, network volumes.
- Cross-Mac telemetry (no analytics, no remote sync, no cloud).
- App Store distribution (sandboxing breaks IOKit access).

If your request lands in one of these areas, it's still worth
filing — sometimes the right answer is to document the exclusion
more visibly. Just expect the response to be "this is intentionally
out of scope; here's why."

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, screenshots from other tools — anything
     that helps the discussion. Optional. -->
